description_long: This object consists of three pumpkins of varying sizes, grouped together on a flat, dark green circular base. Each pumpkin is a vibrant orange with subtle shading and vertical ridges, giving them a natural, organic appearance. The pumpkins have short, brownish-green stems protruding from their tops, and their surfaces are matte with a slightly rough texture. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories on any of the pumpkins. The base appears to be a stylized patch or mat, possibly representing grass or a garden bed. The overall look is simple and realistic, suitable for autumn or harvest-themed urban displays.
description: A group of three orange pumpkins with stems, resting on a dark green circular base, uncarved and natural in appearance.
description_view_0: Two pumpkins are prominently visible, with the largest in the foreground and a smaller one behind, all on a green base.
description_view_1: All three pumpkins are clearly visible, with the largest in the back and the smallest in the front, showing their size differences.
description_view_2: The largest pumpkin is centered, flanked by the two smaller pumpkins, highlighting their arrangement on the base.
description_view_3: The two smaller pumpkins are more visible, with the largest pumpkin partially obscured, emphasizing the grouping.
attribute_placement_location: on a flat green base, possibly representing grass or a garden patch
